PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carrie Winters appeared by zoom for and with John Thorpe by zoom.

The court stated that it reviewed the petition and that it is well supported. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.
